candidates.title: OpenAI unveils Lockdown Mode to protect sensitive data from prompt injection attacks
candidates.summary: Even with Lockdown Mode, ChatGPT could be still vulnerable to prompt injections, but the goal is to reduce the likelihood that sensitive data gets shared in the process.

candidates.title: Sriram Krishnan is leaving his role as White House AI advisor
candidates.summary: Krishnan is reportedly starting a new institution to continue shaping Trump's AI policy.
